package.name: agimus_demo_tiago_pro_planar_base
package.description:
Testbed for TIAGo Pro whole-body MPC with a planar mobile base. The robot base is modelled as a 3-DoF planar joint (x, y, yaw) and the right arm as 7 actuated joints. The MPC uses a mixed actuation model: velocity commands for the base, torque control for the arm.
This package contains demos that progressively test the planar-base infrastructure: - fixed_goal: drive the right-arm end-effector to a fixed Cartesian target while the base is free to move.
